arts.ttl: Why Rodrygo didn’t play a minute for Real Madrid vs Barcelona
arts.sum: An explanation for the lack of game time afforded to Rodrygo in the club’s meeting with Barcelona has been provided. The name of frontman Rodrygo has of course proven a…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans hang angry banner at club’s training ground after Barcelona defeat
arts.sum: A section of Real Madrid supporters took to the club’s training ground on Sunday evening, to make clear their feelings with Carlo Ancelotti’s squad. This of course comes fresh off…

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal poked fun at Real Madrid with Cristiano Ronaldo celebration in Barcelona victory
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal made use of the opportunity to have some fun at the expense of all associated with Real Madrid on Sunday. This, of course, came en route…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick equals Pep Guardiola in Barcelona history books after victory over Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Sunday secured for himself a special piece of club history. This comes owing to the Blaugrana’s latest victory over arch rivals Real Madrid.…

arts.ttl: What Barcelona need to win LaLiga after their Clasico victory: Almost impossible for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid must win the three games they have left and hope that Barcelona do not pick up more than two points in theirs, which seems unlikely. On the other hand, if Madrid do not win their next match against Mallorca, the Catalans will be the new champions, regardless of what happens in their visit to Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star rejects Man of the Match award after win over Real Madrid: ‘I don’t deserve it’
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha made clear his feelings that he did not deserve the Man of the Match award for the club’s latest outing. Barcelona were of course back in action…

arts.ttl: 'Suffering makes us strong' - Barcelona joy despite Mbappe record
arts.sum: Barcelona are on the brink of winning La Liga after responding to a heartbreaking Champions League exit by beating Real Madrid 4-3 - and their long-term future looks good too.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Real Madrid ‘competed against great Barcelona’, but defeat ends La Liga hopes
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti insisted that ‘everyone is entitled to their own opinion’ regarding his time at...

arts.ttl: X Reacts to Barcelona vs. Real Madrid in Exciting Seven-Goal El Clasico
arts.sum: Barcelona came back from two goals down to defeat Real Madrid and essentially cling the La Liga title in the final Clásico of the season.

arts.ttl: Joan Laporta and Travis Scott celebrate as Barcelona sweep Real Madrid aside
arts.sum: However, four goals from Eric Garcia, Lamine Yamal and a brace from Raphinha before the interval turned the game around and despite Mbappé offering some hope for Ancelotti’s side with a third for the visitors, the Barça rearguard did its job and a win at Cornella next Thursday will see Barcelona crowned champions. Following the win, the pair were pictured celebrating emphatically with the 24-25 LaLiga title now Barcelona’s to lose.
